channel.title: Congressional Job Tracker
channel.description: Aggregating employment opportunities across the U.S. Congress

item.title: Law Fellow - U.S. Senate
item.description: Office: Senator Adam B. Schiff | Location: Washington, DC | Affiliation: Democratic | Senator Adam Schiff (D-CA), a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, seeks a post-graduate Legal Fellow for a one-year term. Start date is flexible. Applicants must be a recent law school graduate...
